results.alt: Since 1998, Artitect Machinery has been at the forefront of sheet metal folding technology. Our double folding machines and metal folders are designed and manufactured to the highest standards, serving industries from HVAC and construction to automotive and aerospace. Trusted by Professionals Worldwide
